title: Intune Analytics - Device Health

tiles.title: 📊 Health Score Distribution
tiles.query:
DeviceScores_Current
| extend ScoreBucket = case(
    EndpointAnalyticsScore >= 80, '80-100 (Excellent)',
    EndpointAnalyticsScore >= 60, '60-79 (Good)',
    EndpointAnalyticsScore >= 40, '40-59 (Fair)',
    EndpointAnalyticsScore >= 20, '20-39 (Poor)',
    'Below 20 (Critical)')
| summarize Count=count() by ScoreBucket
| order by ScoreBucket asc

tiles.title: 🏥 Devices by Health Status
tiles.query:
DeviceScores_Current
| summarize Count=count() by HealthStatus
| order by Count desc

tiles.title: 🔴 Worst Health Devices (Top 15)
tiles.query:
PoorHealthDevices(50)
| take 15
| project DeviceName, UserPrincipalName, EndpointAnalyticsScore, StartupPerformanceScore, AppReliabilityScore

tiles.title: 💻 Devices by OS
tiles.query:
ManagedDevices_Current
| summarize Count=count() by OperatingSystem
| order by Count desc

tiles.title: 👻 Stale Devices List
tiles.query:
StaleDevices(14)
| take 20
| project DeviceName, UserDisplayName, OperatingSystem, DaysSinceSync, LastSyncDateTime

tiles.title: 🔐 Encryption Coverage
tiles.query:
ManagedDevices_Current
| summarize 
    Encrypted=countif(IsEncrypted == true),
    NotEncrypted=countif(IsEncrypted == false or isnull(IsEncrypted))
| extend EncryptionRate = round(100.0 * Encrypted / (Encrypted + NotEncrypted), 1)

description: Overview of device health, activity, and inventory. Track health scores, identify stale devices, and monitor device encryption status.
